name: Cream of Corn-Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Corn kernels, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions: Preparation Time: 0:30 In a blender, combine 1 cup milk (reserve the other cup), and corn, potatoes, onion, mustard, garlic, honey, and cayenne pepper. Process until corn and potato are coarsely pureed. Pour into a saucepan. Add remaining 1 cup milk and dry milk. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer gently for 20 minutes, or until potatoes are thoroughly cooked and soup is thick and rich. Ladle into serving bowls and sprinkle each bowlful with paprika for color.
